_comment: WHMCS client-membership series per calendar year, from FFC-Cloudflare-Automation workflow '214. WHMCS - Clients Metrics (aggregate, no PII)'. Aggregate integer counts only. activeCumulativeByYearEnd = clients signed up by Dec 31 whose status is Active TODAY — a floor for historical active-member counts (members active then but closed since are not counted). NOTE: the legacy Candid profile series (2021: 76, 2022: 104, 2023: 221) does NOT reconstruct from WHMCS — 221 exceeds even the total clients existing by end-2023 (183) — so it counted a different population (likely domains/orgs from another source). From 2024 the Candid series anchors to this WHMCS reconstruction with a methodology-change note.
source: Workflow 214 run 1 (2026-07-02, run 28558629802): GetClients full pagination, 418 clients; values transcribed by the operator from the run step summary
